Question 10
Do you agree to Orbit Own's terms? *
🌟 Orbit Own's Promise to You:
We charge zero upfront. We ask for only 15 days — during this period, we will market your flat aggressively across all platforms and connect you with verified tenants. If we successfully close a rental deal, our fee is 15% of one month's rent — a single one-time payment. If we are unable to close a rental deal within 15 days, you are completely free to list with anyone else. No lock-in period. No advance payment. No hidden charges. ✅
You must agree to our terms to proceed.
Question 11
When can our team visit the property? *
